name: Hisense Visual Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hisense Visual Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells television sets, digital television broadcasting receiving equipment, and information network terminal products in China and internationally. The company was formerly known as Hisense Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hisense Visual Technology Co., Ltd. in December 2019. Hisense Visual Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is based in Qingdao, China.
